synthesis.driver: Fresh tanker attacks in Hormuz push Brent up $2.10, but oversupply limits further gains.
synthesis.based_on: Three tankers hit in latest attacks in the Strait of Hormuz, British military says - Pittsburgh Post-Gazette

takes.three tankers hit in latest attacks in t: Tanker attacks escalate risks, supporting higher oil prices despite global oversupply.
takes.uae unveils bold plan to bypass strait o: UAE bypass plan signals long-term mitigation, negligible immediate impact on prices.
takes.iran rejects imo draft defends legal pos: Iran's legal defense signals defiance, adding to geopolitical tension and risk premium.
takes.oil prices rise as attacks revive safety: Safety concerns from attacks sustain upward pressure on oil prices.
takes.3 tankers including india bound vessel a: Multiple tanker hits escalate supply risks, reinforcing upward pressure on Brent.
